global.description: The ad features a bright yellow background with a logo, headline, body text, and a call-to-action button.
global.main_message: Promoting quick meal options with SnapMeal.

elements.label: Solid yellow background
elements.description: A bright, solid yellow background fills the entire banner, providing a vibrant and cheerful base.

elements.label: SnapMeal logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring a stylized meal icon, positioned at the top left corner with a clean design.

elements.label: Dinner in minutes
elements.description: Bold, black text stating 'Dinner in minutes' is prominently displayed in the center, conveying urgency and appeal.
elements.text_content: Dinner in minutes Fresh favorites nearby

elements.label: Fresh favorites nearby
elements.description: Smaller black text below the headline reads 'Fresh favorites nearby', providing additional context.

elements.label: Learn more button
elements.description: A rectangular button with the text 'Learn more' in white, set against a contrasting background, located at the bottom center.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top left, the headline is centered, body text is below the headline, and the CTA is at the bottom center.
